# tenzir_alert (Resource)

A node-offline alert in a Tenzir Platform workspace. When the node has been disconnected for `duration` seconds, the platform sends `webhook_body` as an HTTP POST request to `webhook_url`.

The platform supports at most one alert per node. It also has no update operation for alerts, so changing any attribute replaces the alert.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `duration` (Number) How long the node must be disconnected before the alert fires, in seconds.
- `node_id` (String) Identifier of the node whose connectivity is monitored.
- `webhook_body` (String) Body of the webhook request. Must be a valid JSON document; prefer `jsonencode()` over a raw string.
- `webhook_url` (String) URL the alert webhook is POSTed to.
- `workspace_id` (String) Identifier of the workspace the alert belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the alert.
